name: Wall of Inferno
tips: Choose any tile to mark its entire row. Every enemy minion in that row becomes Burning after the react window resolves.
A crowded row gives the best value, but an empty row is still a legal target when you need to bait a response.
Wall of Inferno never burns your own minions, even when both players have units in the chosen row.
rulings: Targeting happens before the spell enters the spell stage. The chosen row stays highlighted while either player inspects the board.
Burn all living enemy minions in the chosen row. Friendly minions and enemy minions in other rows are unaffected.
Burn is non-stacking. An enemy that is already Burning remains Burning with its existing scope.
If the chosen row is empty when Wall of Inferno resolves, the spell resolves with no effect.
